verification_notes.note: Wave 18 added official BMW 09/2018 technical-data evidence for the F82 M4 and M4 Competition showing 6-speed manual VI gear 0.846 and 7-speed M-DCT VII gear 0.671 with final drive 3.462. Production now promotes those exact top-gear values and full forward gear-ratio sets, replacing the prior mismatched top-gear defaults.
Legacy variant-source research previously recorded this variant as BMW press release with High confidence.

unresolved.item: BMW M4 (F82) one exact ratio package across all lifecycle updates
unresolved.reason: Wave 18 confirms 09/2018 ACEA mapping, but this pass did not recover every pre-LCI and late-run sheet to prove no lifecycle ratio change.
Official sources include additional derivatives such as GTS states and this row intentionally keeps only base M4 and M4 Competition mapping.
